name: high_temp_only
expected_actions: High temperature detected. Check cooling system.

name: critical_temp
expected_actions: High temperature detected. Check cooling system.
CRITICAL: Shutdown recommended. Immediate inspection required.

name: multi_condition
expected_actions: High temperature detected. Check cooling system.
Pressure exceeds normal range. Inspect seals and relief valves.
High humidity. Risk of condensation on electronics.

name: engine_fire_boolean
expected_actions: ENGINE FIRE. Execute fire suppression procedure immediately.
